name: AWP | 蠕虫之神
descriptionEn: High risk and high reward, the infamous AWP is recognizable by its signature report and one-shot, one-kill policy. It has been painted with the image of a skull and roots using high-durability enamel paints. There are some roots you don't want to take hold
descriptionZh: 高风险，高回报，恶名昭彰的 AWP 因其标志性的枪声和一枪一个的准则而为人熟知。 这把武器使用高耐用性瓷漆，配以头骨和树根的图象进行了涂装。 有些根你无论如何都不会想去碰的
